art_news.summary: April 2026 art scene highlights: Prints market boom with IFPDA Print Fair and Artnet sales; Tokyo Contemporary Art Award winners Han Ishu and yang02; Must-see exhibitions include Gabriel Orozco's MIT installation and living material showcases.

market_summary.note: Major U.S. and Indian stock markets are closed today in observance of Good Friday. Markets will reopen on Monday, April 6.
